title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
